failedAssertions.reason: Profile routes not properly scoped to user. POST /api/profile doesn't use authenticated userId. GET /api/profile is in PUBLIC_PATHS bypassing auth.
Session routes not properly scoped to user. Backend unit tests fail because createSession doesn't associate sessions with authenticated user.
Session detail routes not properly scoped to user. Backend unit tests show session.user_id doesn't match authenticated user.

summary: Encryption (VAL-ENCRYPT-001 to VAL-ENCRYPT-006) all pass - data is properly encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM and Argon2id key derivation. However, multi-user isolation (VAL-MULTI-001 to VAL-MULTI-003) fails because profile and session routes don't properly associate data with the authenticated user's ID. The backend unit tests for multi-user isolation fail because createProfile/createSession use getOrCreateDefaultUser() instead of the authenticated user's ID.
